hpm_subtitle: Manage and install .hpkg packages. Built-in Hecos modules cannot be uninstalled.
hpm_confirm_uninstall: Are you sure you want to uninstall the package '{0}'?
hpm_desc_backend: Manages communication with AI models and the API provider.
hpm_desc_routing: Routes requests to the most suitable model or tool.
hpm_desc_ia: Defines the system prompt and core AI directives.
hpm_desc_filters: Pre/post processing filters for exchanged messages.
hpm_desc_memory: Semantic vector memory and long-term context management.
hpm_desc_agent: Manages AI agentic loop iterations and task execution.
hpm_desc_aesthetics: Visual configurations, UI themes, and color schemes.
hpm_desc_mcp: Integration with the MCP (Model Context Protocol).
hpm_desc_bridge: Manages webhooks and generic external API connections.
hpm_desc_flows: Automation engine based on visual node diagrams.
hpm_desc_sysnet: Tools for interacting with the file system and local network.
hpm_desc_browser: Integrated engine allowing the AI to browse the web.
hpm_desc_executor: Executor for isolated Python code and shell scripts.
hpm_desc_hdcs: Interpreter for direct text commands to the AI.
hpm_desc_widgets: Manager for dynamic widget rendering in the Control Room.
hpm_desc_webui: Main Hecos web interface and Flask backend.
hpm_desc_backup: Automatic system for data and configuration backups.
hpm_desc_users: Management of user profiles, roles, and permissions.
hpm_desc_voice: Integrated voice listening (STT) and speech synthesis (TTS).
hpm_desc_media: Music player and multimedia playlist manager.
hpm_desc_igen: Local image generator (Flux/SD) or via API.
hpm_desc_messenger: Bot integration with Telegram or other messaging services.
hpm_desc_contacts: Address book and contact information management.
hpm_desc_mail: Complete email client for reading and sending mail.
hpm_desc_remote_triggers: Remote triggers via webhooks and external commands.
hpm_desc_web: Search on search engines like Google or DuckDuckGo.
hpm_desc_webcam: Photo capture and vision from webcam or local cameras.
hpm_desc_reminder: Management of reminders and timed alerts.
hpm_desc_lists: Shopping lists, todo lists, and tasks.
hpm_desc_map: Integration with maps and place search (Google Maps/OSM).
hpm_desc_drive_editor: Integrated text editor for Hecos Drive.
hpm_allow_unsigned: Allow unsigned packages (For local development only)
hpm_registry_desc: Browse and install community packages directly from the Hecos online registry. This feature will be available in a future release.
